name: Modern Bodybuild -- Female Physique
description: 4x/week Upper/Lower/Full Body split emphasizing glutes, hamstrings, and shoulders. Machine and cable-heavy for controlled progressive overload. Skip a full-body day for 3x/week.

weeks.description: Introduction - Getting the body used to the new routine. Focus on full ROM and mind-muscle connection. Keep plenty in reserve.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull-up
exercises.notes: More weight = more assistance. Reduce weight as you get stronger.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
exercises.notes: Adjust safety catches on the side rails to allow full ROM with a safe bail.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Bar stays close to legs. Stop when you feel a deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Position bar in hip crease with pad. Drive through heels, squeeze glutes at top.

exercises.name: Thigh Abductor
exercises.notes: Lean forward during sets to activate glutes.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Lat Pull-Around
exercises.notes: Set up so you're pulling the cable across your body. Start with a light stretch in your lats. Pull so that elbow and fist are aligned with the cable's motion as you extend and squeeze the shoulder.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
exercises.notes: Keep core tight, squeeze glute at full extension. No lower back swing.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

weeks.description: Increasing Intensity - Reducing reps-in-reserve as the body adjusts. Start pushing a little harder, especially on machine and cable movements.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull-up

weeks.description: Holding Steady - Continue knocking out moderately-intense sets. Focus on execution quality — same intensity as week 2 but tighter reps.

exercises.name: Face Pull

weeks.description: Peak Intensity - All exercises are more intense, especially those safe to take to failure (0 RIR). Big leg movements like squats and RDLs are kept conservative.

weeks.name: Deload
weeks.description: Rest Up - Congrats on finishing all four weeks. Now let's give your body a chance to recover.
